notes: Built from the known-working 0.2.21 portable template via 0.2.28.
Keeps the working launch layout unchanged.
Trace exports remain raw Excel files.
Trace Merge Range now reads raw hourly Trace Excel exports directly into Trace_Master.parquet.
Avoids Excel sheet row-limit failures for large ranges over 1,048,576 rows.
Trace_Master.xlsx remains untouched as a legacy seed/source file if Parquet does not exist.
Dataset Center reads Trace_Master.parquet metadata safely without full-reading it at startup.
